meaning: n.最前部,最前线,最活动的中心
examples: The pension issue was not at the forefront of his mind in the spring of 1985.
The new product took the company to the forefront of the computer software field.
You are really on the forefront.
Research: undertake and coordinate forefront research in the field of number theory and arithmetic geometry.
Aggregator and reseller Gnip is at the forefront of the growing marketplace for social data.
